response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-native industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Extensive background in testing, CI/CD, and agile practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL work in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial IoT protocols, MQTT, or IEC 62443 standards
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not embedded or high-performance systems
